title: Perform torquing and fastening on motor sport competition vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform torquing and fastening on motor sport competition vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Component supplier and team torquing and fastening specifications are sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.4 Work area is cleaned and laid out for job requirements according to team procedures1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.6 Problems with work area and operation of tools and equipment are reported to appropriate persons according to team procedures as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Component supplier and team torquing and fastening specifications are sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.4 Work area is cleaned and laid out for job requirements according to team procedures1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.6 Problems with work area and operation of tools and equipment are reported to appropriate persons according to team procedures as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Component supplier and team torquing and fastening specifications are sourced and interpreted1.3 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability1.4 Work area is cleaned and laid out for job requirements according to team procedures1.5 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.6 Problems with work area and operation of tools and equipment are reported to appropriate persons according to team procedures as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Fasten components

pcs.text: Components to be fastened are inspected, prepared and assembled using gaskets, sealants, adhesives or lubricants as required and according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Components are installed and checked, and fasteners are tensioned according to team and manufacturer procedures2.3 Mechanical fastener securing devices are fitted according to team and manufacturer procedures2.4 Sealant and liquid locking adhesive cure times are observed according to team and manufacturer specifications as required2.5 Component fastening problems are reported to appropriate persons according to team procedures as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Components to be fastened are inspected, prepared and assembled using gaskets, sealants, adhesives or lubricants as required and according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Components are installed and checked, and fasteners are tensioned according to team and manufacturer procedures2.3 Mechanical fastener securing devices are fitted according to team and manufacturer procedures2.4 Sealant and liquid locking adhesive cure times are observed according to team and manufacturer specifications as required2.5 Component fastening problems are reported to appropriate persons according to team procedures as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Components to be fastened are inspected, prepared and assembled using gaskets, sealants, adhesives or lubricants as required and according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Components are installed and checked, and fasteners are tensioned according to team and manufacturer procedures2.3 Mechanical fastener securing devices are fitted according to team and manufacturer procedures2.4 Sealant and liquid locking adhesive cure times are observed according to team and manufacturer specifications as required2.5 Component fastening problems are reported to appropriate persons according to team procedures as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Fasten components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to team procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to team procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to team procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
